description_long: This is a black, rectangular desktop computer tower case, featuring a metal chassis with mesh ventilation panels on the side and top for airflow. The front panel is equipped with multiple USB ports, audio jacks, and expansion bays, as well as a visible brand logo. The rear side reveals various input/output ports, including USB, HDMI, VGA, and audio connectors, along with expansion slots and a power supply socket. The case is primarily constructed from metal and plastic, with perforated sections for cooling and dust filtration. Its overall design is utilitarian, with a matte black finish and minimal decorative elements. This object is typically found in offices, homes, or server rooms, but could also appear in urban environments such as tech shops or repair centers.
description: A matte black desktop computer tower case with mesh ventilation, multiple front ports, and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing two mesh ventilation panels for airflow and a mostly featureless black surface.
description_view_1: Front view displaying USB ports, audio jacks, expansion bays, and a brand logo.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a solid, unventilated black panel and no visible features.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing I/O ports, expansion slots, power supply socket, and additional ventilation.
